statement: In every magma, Equation 2177 (`x = ((y * z) * x) * (w * u)`) implies Equation 3418 (`x * y = z * (z * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0891
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) x) (op w u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op z (op y y)))
